rovers_sites.note: BBC Radio Bristol live on BBC Sounds — match commentary and local coverage

rovers_sites.note: Bristol Rovers fan podcast hosted by Max Alderson, Neno, Caz May, Michael Willett — weekly discussion

rovers_sites.title: Rovers Wikipedia

rovers_sites.title: Memorial Stadium Info
rovers_sites.note: Official page for Bristol Rovers' home ground — capacity 12,300, opened 1921, Rovers since 1996
